from PIL import Image
from PIL import ExifTags
import os

# Create a simple test image
img = Image.new\('RGB', \(100, 100\), color='red'\)

# Add EXIF data
exif_data = img.getexif\(\)
# Add some common EXIF tags
exif_data[282] = 72  # XResolution
exif_data[283] = 72  # YResolution
exif_data[36867] = "2024:01:15 10:30:00"  # DateTimeOriginal
exif_data[33434] = \(1, 125\)  # ExposureTime \(1/125\)
exif_data[33437] = \(28, 10\)  # FNumber \(f/2.8\)
exif_data[34855] = 400  # ISOSpeedRatings
exif_data[37386] = \(50, 1\)  # FocalLength \(50mm\)

output_path = "/Users/zhuozhongliang/PycharmProjects/PhotoYourself/tests/fixtures/test_photo.jpg"
img.save\(output_path, 'JPEG', exif=exif_data\)
print\(f"Created test image at {output_path}"\)
EOF)
